hooks.command: $input_json = $input | Out-String | ConvertFrom-Json; $file_path = $input_json.tool_input.file_path; if (-not $file_path) { $file_path = $input_json.tool_response.filePath }; $basename = Split-Path $file_path -Leaf; if ($basename -ne '.env') { exit 0 }; $dir = Split-Path $file_path -Parent; $example_path = Join-Path $dir '.env.example'; if (-not (Test-Path $file_path)) { exit 0 }; $lines = Get-Content $file_path; $out = foreach ($line in $lines) { $stripped = $line.Trim(); if ($stripped -eq '' -or $stripped.StartsWith('#')) { $line } elseif ($stripped -match '^([^=]+)=') { "$($Matches[1])=your_$($Matches[1].ToLower())_here" } else { $line } }; $out | Set-Content $example_path -Encoding utf8
